descriptionHtml: Verify Minimum and Maximum Password Length Restrictions (negative)

steps.name: Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field

steps.name: Enter new password in the 'Password' field

Verify: Save button is disabled due 7 characters short password using

Verify that the 'Password' field is limited to 20 characters.
Verify that the 'RepeatPassword' field is limited to 20 characters.
